title: Times Wondered
description: A modpack that improves MC and adds something for everyone!
body:
This modpack adds something that everyone can enjoy! pack changes based off input!

**_MODS ARE STILL BEING ADDED & REMOVED CONSTANTLY_**


## Major mods!
- Create & addons
- Farmers delight & addons
- Origins & addons
- World gen mods (all dimensions)
- Serene Seasons


there is plenty more!


## Preformance minimal
- **6GB ram**
- **GeForce GTX 1060**

**This is here due to the types of mods in here!**

## Preformance recommended
- **10GB ram**
- **GeForce RTX 3060**

**This is here due to the types of mods in here!**

_Preformance stats are what is dedicated to MC not system specs EX: pc has 12GB ram, MC needs to have 6GB dedicated to it from the pc._

## :)

**There will be newer and older version of MC supported!**
expect 1.16 - 1.21 :)

**ARR** - 
<details>
<summary>ARR</summary>

_If this modpack is reuploaded anywhere it must keep the same icon, name, and description
with a link back to the oringal upload here on modrinth._


</details>


-**_Tlumzy :>_**
